posts.text:
anyone else having this issue with the Threads web client sidebar flyout thing being blank? It seems like its getting stuck between collapsed and expanded. I have been seeing this for awhile now. I think it relates to the window size - it seems to happen when I have a window width of around ~1045px

Zen 1.20.2b (Firefox 151.0.3) (aarch64)

can't stop thinking about this question

whoistheoldestbaby.com

if you smell something burning its just my tokens - yikes. 3.9B in the last 30 days?! 

I have been pedal to the floor on Rackula and a few other personal projects recently
Wow, my brother sent me this photo of a bear from a site in northern BC (near Quesnel) - that is one heifer of a black bear
